{{Infobox concept
| name = Iron stage
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Iron stage]] is a level of [[sacred artist]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Iron]] is a stage of advancement.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|An [[Iron body]] is a quantitative difference compared to [[Copper]] or below, making [[Irons]] superhuman.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5">''Unsouled'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Advancing to [[Iron]] refines the body and expels impurities.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
